225 RSN_INFLNZ_NOT_RCVD_CD RSN_INFLNZ_NOT_RCVD_CD O0250C Reason Influenza Not Received Code CHAR 1 This column documents the reason the patient did not receive an influenza vaccination. 1 - Patient not in this facility during this year's influenza vaccination season
2 - Received outside of this facility
3 - Not eligible - medical contraindication 
4 - Offered and declined
5 - Not offered
6 - Inability to obtain influenza vaccine due to a
